description: Small fragment from the top of the ketubba of Karīma bt. Yosef. Dated: [13]68 or [14]68 Seleucid. Another ketubba for a bride bearing the same name is found in T-S 12.489 (PGPID 7240), where she is titled 'the virgin'. If we are talking about the same bride , that might be her first marriage.
description_he: שבר קטן מראש כתובת כְּרִימָה בת יוסף. תיארוך: [13]68 או [14]68 לסלאוקי.
